query: SELECT l.id, l.nome, l.numeroLoja FROM lojas l WHERE l.nome NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ef.nomeLoja FROM eurocodes_fichas ef WHERE ef.analiseId = 810001) ORDER BY l.nome;
